channel.title: SPL - Greenwood Branch
channel.description: Upcoming events for SPL - Greenwood Branch

item.title: Slow Flow Community Yoga
item.description:
Tuesday, March 17, 2026 at 4:30 PM

Location: Greenwood Branch, Meeting Room

Join us for all-levels slow flow community yoga.

Event details

item.title: Family Story Time
item.description:
Wednesday, March 18, 2026 at 10:30 AM

Location: Greenwood Branch, Meeting Room

At storytime, kids ages 0-5 and their families can enjoy stories, songs, and fun learning activities. 

Event details

item.title: Game On for Kids! Role-playing game (RPG)
item.description:
Wednesday, March 18, 2026 at 3:30 PM

Location: Greenwood Branch, Meeting Room

Small group RPGs full of magical and dangerous scenarios where players use their characters' unique powers, as well as teamwork (and a little luck!) to solve problems creatively.

Event details

item.title: Free Tax Help
item.description:
Thursday, March 19, 2026 at 11 AM

Location: Greenwood Branch, Meeting Room

Trained volunteers will be available to answer questions and prepare personal tax returns.

Event details

item.title: Sensory Friendly Music with Music Center of the Northwest
item.description:
Thursday, March 19, 2026 at 5:30 PM

Location: Greenwood Branch, Meeting Room

Come jam with us in this inclusive music therapy group for kids hosted by Music Center Northwest!

Event details

item.title: La Hora de Cuentos
item.description:
Friday, March 20, 2026 at 11:15 AM

Location: Greenwood Branch, Meeting Room

Durante la hora de cuentos, los niños de 0 a 5 años y sus familias pueden disfrutar de historias, canciones y divertidas actividades de aprendizaje.Evento en español.

Event details

item.title: Bilingual All Ability Story Time / La hora de cuentos bilingüe para todas las habilidades
item.description:
Saturday, March 21, 2026 at 11 AM

Location: Greenwood Branch, Meeting Room / Sala de reuniones

Children of all abilities are invited to this sensory friendly story time. Program in English and Spanish.-------------------------------------------------------Los niños de todas las habilidades están invitados a esta hora de cuentos sensorial. Evento en inglés y español. 

Event details

item.title: Reduced and Free Transit Fare Enrollment
item.description:
Tuesday, March 24, 2026 at 2 PM

Location: Greenwood Branch

Low-income individuals and individuals with disabilities can receive a reduced-fare ORCA LIFT transit pass.Individuals receiving TANF, RCA, PWA, SSI, HEN, or ABD can receive a subsidized year-long pass.

Event details

item.title: Slow Flow Community Yoga
item.description:
Tuesday, March 24, 2026 at 4:30 PM

Location: Greenwood Branch, Meeting Room

Join us for all-levels slow flow community yoga.

Event details
